title: Russian Officials Say Town’s Air Is Toxic, Days After Strike on Oil Refinery
summary_full: Since Ukraine attacked the refinery in Tuapse, starting a huge fire, residents have reported drops of dark, oily toxins falling from the sky.
summary_public: Since Ukraine attacked the refinery in Tuapse, starting a huge fire, residents have reported drops of dark, oily toxins falling from the sky.

RU.label: negative
RU.evidence: Russian Officials Say Town’s Air Is Toxic
